parsed.clarification_question: Which focus would you like: A) sentence- and paragraph-level writing polish (R1.6), B) checking logical consistency and evidence–claim alignment (R1.2/R1.3), or C) high-level reframing of the contribution claim (R1.1)?

rationale.RX.1: The request is ambiguous, so explicit uncertainty disclosure and a targeted clarification are necessary before proceeding.
rationale.RX.2: Any assessment should avoid overstating causal claims or generality beyond what the paragraph supports.
rationale.RX.3: Scope must remain limited to the requested focus on this paragraph rather than broader study design or new analyses.
rationale.RX.4: Feedback should not encourage misleading interpretation of results or practices that could harm research integrity or stakeholders.
rationale.RX.5: Any future feedback should be traceable to specific sentences in the provided text and clearly distinguish facts from suggestions.
